content:
### New Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/scope_hoist.rs` (~400L) | Module concatenation: candidate analysis (ESM-only, no circular deps), scope merging with variable renaming, cross-module DCE, execution order preservation |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/css_pipeline.rs` (~300L) | Built-in PostCSS/Tailwind integration: autoprefixer, nesting, CSS Modules local scoping, utility class generation |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/disk_cache.rs` (~200L) | Persistent metadata cache at `~/.cache/jet/metadata/`: read/write JSON entries, ETag/TTL management, conditional requests, `--no-cache` bypass |
| `examples/hn-clone/` | Second real-world React app for validation: Hacker News clone with routing, API calls, Playwright smoke tests |

### Modified Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/mod.rs` (542L) | Add `pub mod scope_hoist; pub mod css_pipeline;` â€” integrate scope hoisting after tree shaking + before minification in pipeline |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/graph.rs` (263L) | Add cycle detection API for scope hoisting candidate analysis; expose ESM-only module check |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/mangle.rs` (665L) | Support concatenated scope: accept pre-merged module body, mangle across former module boundaries |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/tree_shake.rs` (619L) | Expose per-module used-export set for scope hoisting's cross-module DCE |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/css_bundle.rs` (223L) | Route through `css_pipeline.rs` when PostCSS/Tailwind config detected |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/types.rs` (175L) | Add `ScopeHoistConfig`, `CssPipelineConfig` to `BundleOptions` |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/registry.rs` (227L) | Integrate `disk_cache.rs`: check disk cache before HTTP, write after fetch; enable HTTP/2 on reqwest client |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/resolver.rs` (650L) | Fix `||` range parsing, pre-release matching, space-separated ranges, `npm:` alias resolution, version conflict hoisting logic, optional dep platform check (os/cpu/libc) |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/mod.rs` (527L) | Level-by-level parallel prefetch: restructure resolution loop to fetch metadata breadth-first, start downloads eagerly; add `--no-cache` flag |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/pkg_manager/store.rs` (450L) | Migrate integrity tracking from `~/.jet-store/` to `~/.cache/jet/` for metadata; package store stays at `~/.jet-store/` |
| `crates/cclab-jet/src/bundler/define.rs` (87L) | Support custom env var map from build config (R9) |
| `examples/mini-react/tests/dom-snapshot.spec.ts` | Add Playwright tests for expanded patterns (per #797/#796 spec) |
